ogTitle: Sydenham vs Sydney Olympic Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sydenham and Sydney Olympic Park.
heading: Sydenham vs Sydney Olympic Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sydenham, New South Wales and Sydney Olympic Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sydney Olympic Park has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Sydenham (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sydenham or Sydney Olympic Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sydenham has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Sydney Olympic Park scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sydenham scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Sydney Olympic Park scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sydenham or Sydney Olympic Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sydney Olympic Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
